\tzpentry{ID3483}{Number Density Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3483 introduces Number Density Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\begin{aligned} \frac{dN}{dt} &= -\frac{N}{\tau_c} \;+\; \frac{v_g}{V_\text{eff}}\big(\sigma_\text{em}\,N_e \;-\; \sigma_\text{abs}\,(N_d-N_e)\big)\,N \;+\; \beta_{\text{sp}}\frac{N_e}{\tau_{\text{exc}}} \\ \frac{dN_e}{dt} &= P_{\text{rate}} \;-\; \frac{N_e}{\tau_{\text{exc}}} \;-\; \frac{v_g}{V_\text{eff}}\big(\sigma_\text{em}\,N_e \;-\; \sigma_\text{abs}\,(N_d-N_e)\big)\,N \end{aligned}} \]
